title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Rego Park, Queens | $900–$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Rego Park, Queens. Safe, humane bat control for homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Bats in your Rego Park attic or building? Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, humane bat removal and exclusion services throughout Rego Park and Queens. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to remove bats and seal entry points, protecting your home or business from future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Rego Park homeowners and businesses for years with fast, effective bat control solutions. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and experienced in handling bat issues in Queens' diverse residential and commercial properties, ensuring compliance with all local wildlife regulations.
localContext: Rego Park's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, garden complexes like LeFrak City, and single-family homes near the Queens Center Mall area can all be vulnerable to bat entry through attic vents, chimneys, and roof gaps. The tree-lined streets and proximity to Forest Park create ideal conditions for local bat populations seeking shelter in residential structures.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Rego Park typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and the complexity of the exclusion work required. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Rego Park safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, legal methods for bat removal in Rego Park. Our exclusion techniques allow bats to leave naturally through one-way devices while preventing re-entry. We never harm bats and comply with all New York State wildlife protection laws.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my Rego Park home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or squeaking sounds at dusk or dawn, droppings (guano) in attics or near entry points, brown staining around roof gaps or vents, and seeing bats flying around your property at twilight. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: Most bat exclusion projects in Rego Park take 2-4 weeks to complete, depending on the season and colony size. The exclusion devices must remain in place long enough to ensure all bats have exited. We then seal all entry points and perform cleanup and sanitization of affected areas.
